moments.title: Latitude Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The 20th edition of Latitude Festival runs from Thursday, July 23 to Sunday, July 26, 2026, at Henham Park, Suffolk, with headliners David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Festival Vibe
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is officially underway! Who are you most excited to see at Henham Park this weekend?

angles.name: Headliner Focus
angles.copy: David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi are topping the bill at Latitude Festival in Suffolk this weekend. What's your must-see set?

angles.name: Local Connection
angles.copy: The biggest party in Suffolk has begun! Latitude Festival is bringing music, arts, and comedy to Henham Park until Sunday. Are you there?

moments.title: Truck Festival Opens Its Gates
moments.blurb: Truck Festival, Oxfordshire's 'anti-major' festival, takes place from July 23-26, 2026, featuring headliners The Maccabees, The Libertines, The Wombats, Two Door Cinema Club, and CMAT.

angles.name: Festival Starts
angles.copy: Truck Festival is LIVE this weekend in Oxfordshire! Ready for four days of indie, alternative, and rock? Who are you seeing?

angles.name: Headliner Highlight
angles.copy: The Maccabees, The Libertines, and The Wombats are leading the charge at Truck Festival! Get ready for a huge weekend of live music.

moments.title: F1 Hungarian Grand Prix
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 AWS Hungarian Grand Prix 2026 takes place this weekend, July 24-26, in Budapest, Hungary.

angles.name: Race Weekend Kick-off
angles.copy: Lights out soon! The F1 Hungarian Grand Prix weekend kicks off tomorrow. Who's your pick for pole position?

angles.name: Get Ready
angles.copy: Formula 1 is back this weekend with the Hungarian Grand Prix! Get ready for all the action from Budapest.

moments.title: Premier League Pre-Season Continues
moments.blurb: Premier League clubs continue their pre-season preparations with various friendlies this week, including Bournemouth vs St Pauli (July 24), Everton vs Bolton (July 25), and Chelsea vs Western Sydney Wanderers (July 28).

angles.name: Pre-Season Action
angles.copy: Pre-season is in full swing! Which Premier League teams are you keeping an eye on this week as they gear up for the new season?

angles.name: Club Specific
angles.copy: Your favourite Premier League team is back on the pitch! Pre-season friendlies continue this week. Are you watching any of the action?

moments.title: Official Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' holds the #1 spot on the Official Singles Chart (July 16-22, 2026), while Madonna makes a notable new entry with 'Danceteria'.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are still holding strong at #1 on the Official Singles Chart with 'Rein Me In'! Who else made the Top 40 this week?

angles.name: Madonna's Return
angles.copy: Queen of Pop still reigns! Madonna's 'Danceteria' is a brand new entry in the Top 40, marking her 74th chart hit. Amazing!

moments.title: New Music Friday: Charli XCX Album
moments.blurb: Charli XCX is set to release her new album 'Music, Fashion, Film' tomorrow, July 24, 2026, alongside new releases from The Strokes and FLO.

angles.name: Anticipated Release
angles.copy: New Music Friday is almost here! Charli XCX drops her new album 'Music, Fashion, Film' tomorrow. What are you hoping for?

angles.name: Weekend Listening
angles.copy: Get ready for some fresh tunes! New albums from Charli XCX and The Strokes arrive tomorrow. What's on your weekend playlist?

moments.title: Happy 79th David Essex
moments.blurb: British singer, songwriter, and actor David Essex celebrates his 79th birthday today, July 23, 2026.

angles.name: Birthday Shout-out
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the iconic David Essex! What's your favourite hit from the legendary singer?

angles.name: Classic Hits
angles.copy: From 'Gonna Make You A Star' to 'Hold Me Close', David Essex is 79 today! Celebrate with us by playing his greatest hits.

moments.title: Don Henley Turns 79
moments.blurb: Don Henley, drummer and vocalist for the Eagles, and successful solo artist, turns 79 tomorrow, July 24, 2026.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we're celebrating the legendary Don Henley's 79th birthday! What's your favourite Eagles track or solo hit?

angles.name: Solo & Band Hits
angles.copy: Happy almost birthday to Don Henley! The voice behind countless Eagles classics and solo smash hits turns 79 tomorrow.

moments.title: J.Lo's 57th Birthday
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday tomorrow, July 24, 2026.

angles.name: Birthday Diva
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Jennifer Lopez turns 57 tomorrow. What's your ultimate J.Lo dance anthem?

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: From 'Jenny from the Block' to global icon, Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday tomorrow! What's her best track?

moments.title: Verdine White Turns 75
moments.blurb: Verdine White, bassist and founding member of the legendary Earth, Wind & Fire, celebrates his 75th birthday on Saturday, July 25, 2026.

angles.name: Funk Legend
angles.copy: Boogie wonderland! Verdine White of Earth, Wind & Fire turns 75 on Saturday. What's your favourite EWF groove?

angles.name: Timeless Music
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Verdine White this weekend! The Earth, Wind & Fire bassist turns 75 on Saturday. Time to get down!

moments.title: Thurston Moore is 68
moments.blurb: Thurston Moore, co-founder, guitarist, and vocalist of the influential alternative rock band Sonic Youth, turns 68 on Saturday, July 25, 2026.

angles.name: Alt-Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 68th birthday to alt-rock pioneer Thurston Moore of Sonic Youth this Saturday! What's your favourite track from the band?

angles.name: Influential Guitarist
angles.copy: Celebrating the enduring legacy of Thurston Moore! The Sonic Youth frontman turns 68 on Saturday. Which of their albums defines an era for you?

moments.title: Mick Jagger's 83rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Sir Mick Jagger, the legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, celebrates his 83rd birthday on Sunday, July 26, 2026.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Mick Jagger turns 83 this Sunday. What's your favourite Rolling Stones song to get you moving?

angles.name: Iconic Frontman
angles.copy: Happy 83rd birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger on Sunday! A true icon of rock and roll history.

moments.title: Roger Taylor Turns 77
moments.blurb: Roger Taylor, the acclaimed drummer for the iconic band Queen, celebrates his 77th birthday on Sunday, July 26, 2026.

angles.name: Queen's Drummer
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 77th birthday to Queen's legendary drummer, Roger Taylor, this Sunday! What's your favourite Queen drum fill?

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Celebrate Roger Taylor's 77th birthday on Sunday! The powerhouse behind Queen's biggest hits.

moments.title: Fatboy Slim is 63
moments.blurb: Norman Cook, better known as Fatboy Slim, the influential DJ and producer, celebrates his 63rd birthday on Friday, July 31, 2026.

angles.name: Big Beat Birthday
angles.copy: Eat, sleep, rave, repeat! Happy 63rd birthday to the one and only Fatboy Slim this Friday. What's your favourite track to get the party started?

angles.name: Dance Icon
angles.copy: Praise You! Legendary DJ and producer Fatboy Slim turns 63 this Friday. What's the ultimate Fatboy Slim tune for you?

moments.title: Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival
moments.blurb: Scotland's Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival returns from July 30 to August 1, 2026, in the Scottish Highlands, with headliners James, The Human League, and Callum Beattie.

angles.name: Scottish Festival
angles.copy: Get ready, Scotland! Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival kicks off next Thursday with James, The Human League, and more. Who are you excited for?

angles.name: Headliner Tease
angles.copy: The Human League are heading to the Highlands next week for Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival! Who remembers their classic hits?

moments.title: Camp Bestival Dorset Begins
moments.blurb: Camp Bestival Dorset runs from July 30 to August 2, 2026, at Lulworth Castle, featuring Bastille, Fatboy Slim, Self Esteem, Billy Ocean, Example, and De La Soul.

angles.name: Family Festival
angles.copy: Camp Bestival Dorset kicks off next Thursday! Get ready for a huge weekend of music and family fun at Lulworth Castle.

angles.name: Diverse Lineup
angles.copy: From Bastille to Fatboy Slim, Camp Bestival Dorset has a massive lineup starting next week! Who are you hoping to see?

moments.title: Y-Not Festival Starts
moments.blurb: Y-Not Festival returns to Derbyshire from July 30 to August 2, 2026, with headliners including The Libertines, Reytons, Two Door Cinema Club, and The Streets.

angles.name: Derbyshire Festival
angles.copy: Y-Not Festival is just one week away! Get ready for The Libertines, The Streets, and more in the Peak District.

angles.name: Indie Anthems
angles.copy: Calling all indie fans! Y-Not Festival kicks off next Thursday with a stellar lineup. Which band are you most excited to see?
